title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien hosted the 2026 Oscars at the Dolby Theatre, delivering a humorous, self-effacing monologue.
O'Brien included jokes about Netflix, Timothee Chalamet, and a fake company helping Gen Z watch movies on phones.
Jimmy Kimmel appeared as a guest, making politically charged jokes about CBS and North Korea during his presentation.

title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Janet Swallow, a 68-year-old mother and nurse, was allegedly killed by 18-year-old Anthony DeMayo in her Danvers home.
A GoFundMe page, which has raised nearly $50,000, supports Swallow's family after her tragic death.
Swallow was a nurse at Lahey Hospital; colleagues mourn her loss and offer condolences to her family.

title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Northeastern women's hockey defeated Minnesota 4-2 to advance to the Frozen Four for the fourth time in history.
Sophomore goalie Lisa Jönsson made 45 saves, while four different players scored for Northeastern in the victory.
The Huskies will face No. 1 Ohio State on March 20 at Penn State's Pegula Ice Arena in the Frozen Four.

title: Bomb threat reportedly halts plane at Logan ‘for hours’ before being deemed ‘not credible’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A bomb threat caused a JetBlue plane at Boston Logan Airport to sit on the tarmac for hours Saturday.
The claim of a bomb aboard the plane bound for Vero Beach, Florida, was deemed not credible by State Police.
FBI and bomb sniffing dogs investigated the threat, and an investigation is ongoing with no arrests made yet.

title: 17 arrested during St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston, police say
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Seventeen individuals were arrested during South Boston's St. Patrick's Day parade, primarily for violations related to public drinking.
Boston police seized dozens of 'borgs,' mixed alcoholic drinks, during the event attended by nearly a million people.
Parade route changed, starting at Andrew Square, with MBTA adjusting service to accommodate heavy crowds.

title: 2026 Oscars: Full list of winners (updating live)
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: "One Battle After Another" won Best Picture at the 2026 Oscars, totaling six awards including Best Director for Paul Thomas Anderson.
"Sinners," directed by Ryan Coogler, secured four Oscars, with Michael B. Jordan winning Best Actor.
"KPop Demon Hunters" won Best Animated Feature and "Golden" from the film won Best Original Song.

title: Oscars red carpet: See the best Academy Awards fashion
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: The 2026 Oscars took place at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles on March 15.
Notable attendees included Kate Hudson, Timothee Chalamet, and Elle Fanning, showcasing high fashion on the red carpet.
Conan O'Brien returned as the Oscars host, marking his second consecutive year in the role.

title: All the way from Indonesia, she’s running the Boston Marathon for people with visual impairments
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Fransisca Miraningtyas from Jakarta, Indonesia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support people with visual impairments.
Living with pterygium, Miraningtyas has undergone one eye surgery and plans another after the marathon.
She aims to raise awareness and inspire support for access to eye care and vision-restoring treatment.

title: 5 takeaways from the Revolution’s 6-1 dismantling of FC Cincinnati
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution defeated FC Cincinnati 6-1, tying a club record for goals in an MLS regular season game.
Center back Brayan Ceballos scored two goals from corner kicks, while Luca Langoni provided three first-half assists.
Diego Fagundez made a return to the Revolution, entering in stoppage time and assisting on Peyton Miller’s goal.

title: Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A 22-year-old man died after his kayak overturned in Wellfleet, Cape Cod on Saturday evening.
Emergency crews launched a multi-agency search including boats, a Coast Guard helicopter, and police drones.
The man was found in critical condition after two hours and pronounced dead at Cape Cod Hospital.
